title: Simple Uncrafting Table
description: Add an Uncrafting Table for Fabric/Forge. (分解台を追加します。)
body:
Add an Uncrafting Table for Fabric/Forge. Items created incorrectly with this mod can be disassembled and reused. Experience points are not consumed by default. # Recipe - Uncrafting Table 作業台をダイヤモンドで囲うように並べるとクラフトできる。 ![table](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/392/783/recipe_uncrafting_table.png) ## GUI ![gui](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/504/859/2022-10-06-225338.png) (this mod can increase depending on the item indefinitely, so if you don't want to lose your balance, self-regulation.)


Config file: (GameDirectory)/config/uncraftingtable76.json
